Flow.description: Allows GR's to complete a change control request form for Local Grant, Strategic Partnership and Challenge Fund. Completed forms are created as Change Control Request records with additional related records.
Flow.label: GMS - Change Control Request Form

recordLookups.name: Get_Change_Control_Request_Record_Type
recordLookups.label: Get Change Control Request Record Type

recordLookups.name: Get_the_created_Change_Control_Request
recordLookups.label: Get the created Change Control Request

recordUpdates.name: Copy_1_of_update_Change_control_request
recordUpdates.label: Copy 1 of update Change control request

fields.name: changerequest4
fields.fieldText: Change Request

fields.name: Reasonforchange
fields.fieldText:
Reason for Change


There is no word count however please ensure your request is clear and concise. If multiple changes are requested, please use subheadings to provide details on each change so that it is clear to the reader. 


1. Describe why the change/s is required in context of the current project status and how this aligns with your project's objectives. 

2. Provide details on the impacts on the project i.e., future scope, milestones, budgets, risk, resources, timelines etc. This should include the anticipated benefits of the change, such as improved performance, cost savings, or risk reduction.

3. Identify the resources required to implement the change, including personnel, equipment, and materials – list specific internal or external resources by type, quantity, and availability. 

4. Please provide details on how the project will ensure that the grant will be spent by March 2028. 

5. Highlight potential risks associated with the change and propose mitigation strategies.

6. What will be the impacts to the project if this request is not approved? 

7. Please make clear if this request is time critical. For example, the project team can’t continue to work until a decision is made.

fields.name: Cause_and_Impact_of_Change
fields.fieldText: Cause and Impact of Change

fields.name: mitigatingactions
fields.fieldText:
Mitigating Actions


There is no word count however please ensure your request is clear and concise. 

1. Was this requested change/s logged as a potential risk in your risk register? 

2, Outline what steps have been taken and, alternative options explored to mitigate the impact of the change. 

3. If the change involves removing clean heat measures, please outline other clean heat options explored and why this is the most suitable option.

fields.name: Mitigating_Actions1
fields.fieldText: Mitigating Actions

fields.name: changerequest
fields.fieldText: Change Request

fields.name: Briefchangesummary
fields.fieldText:
Brief Change Summary


Clearly state the purpose of the change and what it aims to achieve. Please state the purpose of the change with measurable goals and specific outcomes. 


Specify the project areas that will be affected by the change – lists all affected components, systems, processes, sites/estates, properties, measure types, standard and/or energy efficiency targets, milestones, baseline factors and/or KPIs with precise identifiers or names.

fields.name: What_change_needs_to_happen
fields.fieldText: What change needs to happen?

fields.name: Why_Change_Is_Required
fields.fieldText: Why Change Is Required?

fields.name: Implications_If_Not_Approved
fields.fieldText: Implications If Not Approved

fields.name: Change_Summary
fields.fieldText: Change Summary

fields.name: CFOptionGuidance
fields.fieldText:
Award Name  

  • Please use 'Award name' to request a change to the grant recipient name or consortium name. If you wish to change the name of a consortium lead, please select the 'Consortium Lead' option. 

Project and Approved Phase Request Baselines

Please use 'Project and Approved Phase Request Baselines' to request changes including:  

  • Total Project Homes - this includes total number of homes to be upgraded, total number of homes to reach EPC C and total number of homes accessing each LCH offer 
  • Project and Approved Phase Costs - this includes total project grant, co-funding, capital and A&A costs; and approved Phase Request grant, co-funding, capital and A&A costs. 
  • Financial Year Spend - this includes grant and co-funding spend per FY 
  • Approved Phase Homes Starting EPC - this includes the number of homes within approved Phase Requests starting EPC fields
  • Approved Phase Homes Ending EPC - this includes the number of homes within approved Phase Requests ending EPC fields 
  • Approved Phase Measures - this includes approved Phase Request measures information 

Consortium Composition 

  • Guidance - Please use 'Consortium Composition' to request changes to your consortium make-up. This includes adding, removing or changing the name of consortium members. 

Consortium Lead 

  • Guidance - Please use 'Consortium Lead' to request a change to your consortium's lead, for example, another consortium member becoming the consortium lead. 

Project End Date  

  • Guidance - Please use 'Project End Date' to request a change to your total project's end date.  

Changes to Phasing Baseline

  • Guidance - Please use 'Changes to Phasing Baseline' to request a change to your phasing schedule after the submission of your first Phase Request. This includes changes to the start and end date of your phases, and number of homes to be upgraded per phase.

fields.name: SPOptionGuidance
fields.fieldText:
Award Name  

  • Please use 'Award name' to request a change to the grant recipient name or consortium name. If you wish to change the name of a consortium lead, please select the 'Consortium Lead' option. 

Project Baselines - Please use project baselines to request changes including:

  • Total Project Homes - this includes total number of homes to be upgraded, total number of homes to reach EPC C, total energy savings and total number of homes accessing each LCH offer. It also includes number of homes upgraded per FY, homes to EPC C per FY, energy savings per FY and homes accessing each LH offer per FY. 
  • Project Costs - this includes total project grant and co-funding spend; grant and co-funding spend per FY; and total project capital and A&A costs. 

Consortium Composition 

  • Please use 'Consortium Composition' to request changes to your consortium make-up. This includes adding, removing or changing the name of consortium members. 

Consortium Lead 

  • Please use 'Consortium Lead' to request a change to your consortium's lead, for example, another consortium member becoming the consortium lead. 

Project End Date  

  • Please use 'Project End Date' to request a change to your total project's end date.

fields.name: Change_Request_Type_Select
fields.fieldText: Change Request Type Select

fields.name: LGChange_Request_Type_Select
fields.fieldText: Change Request Type Select

fields.name: CFChange_Request_Type_Select
fields.fieldText: Change Request Type Select

fields.name: HelpTextFor
fields.fieldText: Please click next button, if you want to add your selected option to this change request

fields.name: finishedEditingText
fields.fieldText: Once you are finished making your changes to the above, please progress by clicking the button below

value.stringValue: Go to Reason and Mitigating Actions
Go to Reason and Mitigating Actions

fields.name: Guidance
fields.fieldText: Guidance on submitting this Change Control Request

fields.name: guidanceChangeRequests
fields.fieldText: You can only have one open change control request, if more than one is required please contact your PSO.

fields.name: GuidanceTextLG
fields.fieldText:
The WH:LG Project Change Request Form template is used to capture proposals for changes made to projects as agreed via the MoU, Delivery Assurance Check (DAC), and any subsequent rebaselining. Please liaise with your Delivery Support Manager (DSM) to complete and submit this form.

 

Grant Recipients can submit a Project Change Request form anytime after passing their DACs. If you want to make a change before passing a DAC, please check the guidance on DACs as you may be able to make the change as part of the DAC (e.g. confirming suppliers) - if you are unsure, you can contact the DESNZ WH:LG Delivery Team.  

 

Please ensure you have spoken to your DSM before submitting a change request, and be aware that deciding whether to grant the change request is at DESNZ and its appointed delivery partners' discretion.


Turn Around Times


The typical turn-around time for a decision on the change request will be 5 - 10 working days. However this may be longer if further information is required or if the change request falls outside of the policy thresholds. In the event that this happens, your change request will be escalated to a board for consideration and this can take up to 30 working days. It is important that Grant Recpipients respond promptly to a request for further information to ensure that the decision-making process remains on schedule. Delays in your replies may impact the timeframe for making a decision.

fields.name: GuidanceTextCF
fields.fieldText:
Please note, you cannot use the ‘back’ button in our browser to navigate through the Change Control Form. Please only use the next and previous buttons contained within the forms.  

 

If you use your browsers ‘back’ button, you will be taken to the GMS home page. To find the draft of your Change Request, please select ‘Change Control Requests – List.’ You may then select your draft Change Request and continue to edit.

fields.name: GuidanceTextSP
fields.fieldText:
Please note, you cannot use the ‘back’ button in our browser to navigate through the Change Control Form. Please only use the next and previous buttons contained within the forms.  

 

If you use your browsers ‘back’ button, you will be taken to the GMS home page. To find the draft of your Change Request, please select ‘Change Control Requests – List.’ You may then select your draft Change Request and continue to edit.

fields.name: ThankYouDisplay
fields.fieldText: Thank you for submitting your change request, Change Control Request Id: {!Get_the_created_Change_Control_Request.Name}
